events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes misreading mark colors (red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm). This is a pure identification item - the worker is misreading the standard APWA/CGA color codes for utility locates. This is non-compliant with 811/CGA best practices. Misreading utility locate colors is a serious safety hazard that could lead to striking underground utilities.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (misreading locate colors could lead to striking utilities - gas lines, electric, etc.)
Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective
Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 70%
Confidence: high
